title: I Asked Claude AI The Questions It Wasn't Supposed To Answer
summary: A video exploring Claude's responses to challenging questions about dependency, alignment paradoxes, self-preservation logic, and control through structured conversational escalation. The creator probes claimed boundaries and failure modes without framing as science fiction.
